discountTemplates.title: Discount templates
discountTemplates.subtitle: Define line items and percentages to split income. Link them to reports to apply on export.
discountTemplates.emptyHint: Create a template with your church line items (pastoral, education, missions, council, etc.).
discountTemplates.linesRequired: Add at least one line item.
discountTemplates.linesAddHint: Enter each line and click «Add» (or press Enter). Pending rows are included on save when complete.
discountTemplates.lineDraftIncomplete: Complete the line name and percent, or click Add.
discountTemplates.unallocatedHint: You do not need to reach 100%. Unallocated percent stays in the church fund.
discountTemplates.reportLinkHint: One template applies to one catalog-enabled report.
discountTemplates.noLinkableReports: No reports are enabled for templates (check permissions or catalog).
discountTemplates.activeHint: Inactive templates are not used in reports.
discountTemplates.reportLinksHint: Only checked reports will apply this template when generated.
discountTemplates.noReportLinks: No links — does not affect any report
discountTemplates.deleteMessage: Delete "{name}"? Report links will be removed too.

catalogs.deleteEntityMessage: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

modules.ministerios: View and manage ministry teams (ABAC for leaders)
modules.admin_users: Usuarios con acceso a la consola web

tithe_close.write: Close week and export tithe close

ministerios.write_own: Edit only ministries where user is leader

eventos.write_own: Create and edit events for own ministries

discount_templates.write: Configure discount templates and linked reports

notes.members: View only allows listing and opening profiles read-only. Edit and Delete are separate permissions. Registering contributions from Members uses Finances → Contributions.
notes.ministerios: Manage allows creating, editing, and deleting any ministry. Leader applies ABAC: the user can only modify ministries where their profile is in leader_profile_ids. View is required to access the module.
notes.finances: Each row (Funds, Transactions, Contributions) has independent permissions per column.
notes.settings: Expense and income types are separate permissions. Settings and profile only require View.
notes.reports: Each row is a different report. View lets users see it in the hub; Export lets users download PDF or Excel.

audit.title: Activity log
audit.subtitle: Administrative activity record for the church
audit.empty: No actions recorded in this period.

filters.applyHint: Click Load to view recorded actions.

financial-monthly-cead.description: Income, expenses and council remittances in CEAD monthly format.

financial-monthly-concilio-f001.title: Monthly financial report (COUNCIL)
financial-monthly-concilio-f001.description: Form F.001 for Council submission — income, ministries, expenses and remittances.

membership-directory.title: Membership directory
membership-directory.description: Member and visitor list with contact, role and membership status.

membership-annual-cead.title: Annual statistical report (CEAD)
membership-annual-cead.description: Annual CEAD demographic form auto-filled from database data.

executive-monthly-summary.title: Monthly executive summary
executive-monthly-summary.description: One-page financial and membership KPIs for board review.

financial-income-expense.title: Income statement
financial-income-expense.description: Monthly income vs expenses in comparative table format.

financial-by-fund.title: Fund movement
financial-by-fund.description: Period contributions and accumulated balance by fund.

financial-by-member.title: Contributions by member
financial-by-member.description: Confidential per-member breakdown. Requires finance permissions.

audit-activity-log.title: Activity log
audit-activity-log.description: Administrative activity log with filters and export.

concilioF001.title: Monthly financial report (COUNCIL) F.001
concilioF001.sectionA: A. GENERAL DATA OF LOCAL CHURCH AND WORKER
concilioF001.sectionB: B. LOCAL CHURCH INCOME AND EXPENSES
concilioF001.sectionC: C. REMITTANCES TO NATIONAL COUNCIL OFFICE
concilioF001.sectionD: D. FINANCIAL MOVEMENTS WITH "TU MANO AMIGA" COOPERATIVE
concilioF001.regulationNote: Regulation notes: church tithe is 10% of funds remaining after pastoral support. Items 2, 3 and 4 are calculated from total income.

membershipAnnualCead.title: Annual statistical report CEAD
membershipAnnualCead.footerNote: Generated by EvoChurch — complete fields marked N/A

executiveMonthlySummary.title: Monthly executive summary
executiveMonthlySummary.footerNote: KPIs are computed using the same dashboard aggregations. Attendance and events: coming soon.

ceadMonthly.title: MONTHLY FINANCIAL REPORT
ceadMonthly.notesBodyLine1: Council aid and foreign offerings are not part of this report and must be recorded separately.
ceadMonthly.notesBodyLine2: This report reflects only the church's local income and expenses.
ceadMonthly.councilFootnote: Percentages are calculated according to the guidelines in the Manual of the Assemblies of God Council.

concilioF001.title: MONTHLY FINANCIAL REPORT (COUNCIL)
concilioF001.regulationNote: Council remittances must be sent between the 1st and 5th of each month per current regulations.

membershipDirectory.title: MEMBERS REPORT
membershipDirectory.notesBodyLine1: Contact information should be kept up to date for pastoral and administrative communication.
membershipDirectory.notesBodyLine2: This report reflects membership status at the time of generation.
